name: Centrefold Nasturtium Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the nasturtium leaves around the outside of a large flat plate.
2. Lay the flowers on top of the leaves with their stem ends pointing toward the center of the dish.
3. Working towards the center of the plate, add a layer of onions.
4. Add a layer of tomatoes.
5. Continue layering until the dish is full.
6. Cover the salad and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to let the flavors blend.
7. Sprinkle with celery and drizzle with vinaigrette.
8. Serve immediately.
